summary_task_agnostic: The robot arm performs a smooth, continuous counter-clockwise rotation of its base joint while all other joints and the gripper remain completely stationary in their home configuration. The 2x2 grid panels correctly display the RGB and depth views.
summary_task_evaluation: The robot successfully completed the task. The base joint rotated smoothly by more than 180 degrees (nearly a full 360-degree rotation) while all other joints and the gripper remained locked in their home configuration. The motion was highly controlled and free of any collisions.
second_by_second_neutral: The robot arm is stationary in its home configuration; all four panels are active and clear.
The robot base (shoulder pan joint) begins to rotate slowly counter-clockwise; other joints remain stationary.
The robot base continues its smooth counter-clockwise rotation; the gripper and other joints do not move.
The robot base continues rotating counter-clockwise, passing the orange box on the floor.
The robot base continues its steady rotation; the wrist camera view shows the background rotating smoothly.
The robot base continues rotating counter-clockwise; all other joints remain locked in their home configuration.
The robot base continues its smooth rotation, now past 180 degrees from its starting orientation.
The robot base continues rotating counter-clockwise; the gripper remains open and stationary relative to the arm.
The robot base continues its slow, controlled rotation; no other joints show any movement.
The robot base continues rotating, approaching a full rotation; the motion remains smooth and stable.
The robot base completes its rotation and comes to a controlled stop; all other joints remain in their home configuration.
second_by_second_task: on task: robot is stationary at home configuration, preparing to rotate.
on task: only the robot base begins to rotate slowly and smoothly; other joints are fixed.
on task: smooth rotation of the base continues with all other joints locked in home configuration.
on task: base rotation continues smoothly past the orange box; no other joint movement detected.
on task: base rotation continues smoothly; other joints and gripper remain perfectly stationary.
on task: base rotation continues; motion is controlled and stable with no other joint articulation.
on task: base rotation exceeds 180 degrees, satisfying the primary rotation angle requirement.
on task: base rotation continues smoothly beyond 180 degrees; other joints remain in home configuration.
on task: base rotation continues in a controlled manner; no joint drift or tracking errors visible.
on task: base rotation continues smoothly towards completion; other joints remain locked.
on task: base rotation stops smoothly; task successfully completed with only the base rotating.
